form.label: DNS dnstap ‚Äî Filterable (Vector vs DNS-collector)
form.description: POC index=mi_dhcp. Filter by Receiver (Vector :6000 / DNS-collector :6001), DNS leg, domain, and client IP. Fields are rex-extracted at search time from the NIOS-style line and handle CLIENT_* and RESOLVER_* legs, so it works without any props/transforms.

search.query: index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ | stats count

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | stats count as q earliest(_time) as a latest(_time) as b | eval QPS=round(q/max(b-a,1),2) | fields QPS

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | rex "(?:_RESPONSE\s+|response:\s+)(?<rcode>[A-Z]+)" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="response" AND rcode="NXDOMAIN" | stats count

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ | stats dc(client) as clients | fields clients

panel.title: Events by receiver (click a slice to filter)

search.query: index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | eval receiver=case(source="dnstap:vector","Vector",source="dnstap:dnscollector","DNS-collector",true(),source) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ | stats count by receiver

panel.title: QPS over time ‚Äî Vector vs DNS-collector

search.query: index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | eval receiver=case(source="dnstap:vector","Vector",source="dnstap:dnscollector","DNS-collector",true(),source) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | timechart span=$span$ count by receiver | foreach * [eval <<FIELD>>=round('<<FIELD>>'/_span,2)] | fields - _span

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | rex "(?:_RESPONSE\s+|response:\s+)(?<rcode>[A-Z]+)" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="response" | timechart span=$span$ count by rcode

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN\s+(?<qtype>[A-Z0-9]+)" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | timechart span=$span$ count by qtype

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | top limit=10 qname showperc=true

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | top limit=10 client showperc=true

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | eval receiver=case(source="dnstap:vector","Vector",source="dnstap:dnscollector","DNS-collector",true(),source) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN\s+(?<qtype>[A-Z0-9]+)" | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | rex "(?:_RESPONSE\s+|response:\s+)(?<rcode>[A-Z]+)" | search qname="$domain$" client="$client$" | where $legwhere$ | sort - _time | table _time receiver leg operation client qname qtype rcode | head 100
